Petition To Compel Trustee To Render Proper Accounting;Distribute Trust Assets; Redress Breach Of Trust; Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-26-2017 Continued To Aug-02-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-26-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Yang for and with Petitioner Beverly Wardlow (appeared by telephone).
Robert Peterson for and with Lucrezia Gilliam (Trustee).

Mr. Yang stated that he and his Client have no objection to the property being part of the Wardlow #1 Trust and that he has no objection to the form of order. The Court granted the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Asset (subject to review of the order).

Mr. Peterson stated that even if they were ready to distribute, they would not be able to distribute to Beverly because her Husband is the Beneficiary to the Wardlow #1 Trust. Mr. Peterson also stated that the Husband is deceased, that they need to probate the Estate even though Beverly is the Beneficiary in the Wardlow #2 Trust, that Beverly didn't have standing when she brought the petition and that the Court should deny it. The Court informed Mr. Yang that he needs a mechanism to move the individual interest out of the Trust and that he is skipping a step. Mr. Yang argued that the Wardlow #2 Trust takes care of that, that the Husband's interest is vested in the Wardlow #2 Trust, that Beverly is a contingent Beneficiary in the #1 Trust and that as far as he knows his Client will succeed in her Husband's interest. Mr. Peterson stated that Beverly is not mentioned in the Wardlow #1 Trust. The Petition to Compel Trustee to Render Proper Accounting, etc. is continued to August 2, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to find out whether the Petitioner can establish a basis/standing to proceed on this petition. If she can not, the expectation is that this will go off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Trustee To Render Proper Accounting;Distribute Trust Assets; Redress Breach Of Trust; Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-28-2017 Continued To Apr-26-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Trustee To Render Proper Accounting;Distribute Trust Assets; Redress Breach Of Trust; Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-28-2017 Continued To Mar-28-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Yang for Beverly Wardlow (appeared by telephone).
Craig Murdock specially appearing for Attorney John Stringer for and with Lucrezia Gilliam.
Tyrone Taylor (Son of Lucrezia) also present.

Mr. Murdock advised the Court that Ms. Gilliam wants to change attorneys. Mr. Yang stated the verification was properly signed and is included in the filing after the petition, that the beneficiaries (James Wardlow, Jr. and Lucrezia) are clearly listed in the petition and that there is no one else. Ms. Gilliam stated that she has retained Robert Peterson, that he was not present because she needed to get the substitution signed and that she just received it today. The Petition to Compel Trustee to Render Proper Accounting, etc. is continued to March 28, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Yang is to file a supplement the petition listing the names of all vested and contingent beneficiaries and the verification.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
